case_title: JUAN PABLO CHIN VS. RAFAEL A. FLORES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S WAS SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO WAS PRESENT IN COURT. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,871.00 FILED BY CHIN, JUAN PABLO AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, RAFAEL A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-14-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
